text: So this was the site of the chest wall tumor.
This is third and this is fourth rib.
On scan it appeared that it is going into the intercostal space but I was able to achieve a margin.
I have removed the pectoralis major, minor and the serratus anterior.
I have only brushed a part of latissimus dorsi.
So I have cleared the axillary vein.
This we can see is the Bell's nerve.
And this is our thoracodorsal pedicle.
So I can see the pulsation there.
One of the branches I have ligated.
But the main pedicle I have preserved, the vein artery.
This is the retinoplasmic dorsi muscle.
